name: Easy Crockpot Roast for Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Select a 3 to 4 pound roast, such as chuck, round, or your preferred cut.
2. Prepare the Italian seasoning mix by combining 1 package of dry Italian seasoning (used for salad dressing) with the roast.
3. Add 1 jar of chopped salad peppers to the mixture.
4. Pour in 1 can of beer, choosing a temperature preference between hot and medium heat.
5. Place the ingredients in the crockpot and cook on low overnight.
6. Once cooked, remove the roast from the crockpot and shred or break it up into desired serving sizes.
7. Serve the shredded roast on hoagie rolls to create an Italian Beef sandwich.
